prompt: A cinematic low-angle medium shot captures a stylish man with uploaded face as reference leaning casually back against a concrete rooftop ledge at night, wearing a sharp black suit, unbuttoned white dress shirt, loosened black tie, and dark sunglasses, with his head tilted upward. The scene utilizes dramatic dual-tone lighting, blending vibrant emerald green ambient city glow with warm tungsten orange key light that highlights the texture of the clothing and skin. The background features a heavily blurred urban skyline with circular bokeh from skyscraper lights, shot on an 85mm lens at f/1.8 for shallow depth of field, emphasizing high-fidelity textures, raytraced lighting, and a moody, photorealistic 8k aesthetic.
promptEn: A cinematic low-angle medium shot captures a stylish man with uploaded face as reference leaning casually back against a concrete rooftop ledge at night, wearing a sharp black suit, unbuttoned white dress shirt, loosened black tie, and dark sunglasses, with his head tilted upward. The scene utilizes dramatic dual-tone lighting, blending vibrant emerald green ambient city glow with warm tungsten orange key light that highlights the texture of the clothing and skin. The background features a heavily blurred urban skyline with circular bokeh from skyscraper lights, shot on an 85mm lens at f/1.8 for shallow depth of field, emphasizing high-fidelity textures, raytraced lighting, and a moody, photorealistic 8k aesthetic.
promptZh: 一张电影感低角度中景镜头，捕捉了一位 以上传人脸为参考的时尚男士 在夜晚随意倚靠在混凝土天台边缘，身着 剪裁利落的黑色西装、解开扣子的白色衬衫、松开的黑色领带以及深色墨镜，头部微微向上倾斜。场景采用了戏剧性的双色调灯光，融合了 充满活力的翡翠绿环境城市光与温暖的钨丝橙色主光，突显了衣物和皮肤的质感。背景为高度虚化的城市天际线，摩天大楼的灯光形成圆形光斑；使用 85mm 镜头、f/1.8 大光圈拍摄以营造浅景深，强调高保真纹理、光线追踪照明以及充满情绪的 8k 照片级写实美学。
